calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; An For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.

payments.description: AMEND COMPL CHANGE PRAYER AMT FROM <= 10K TO > 10K
